creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Yesterday in Discord, user exit70#3252 wrote(1): 

> this section 
> <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/x11/#x-compiz-fusion> 
> seems to be very out of date

True. For example: 

> … Installing the Compiz Fusion package is easy, …

– the package was removed more than two years ago. From <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/f118043f7e5359baac271e6812336cd7c3eb41f6>: 

> 2020-03-02 x11-wm/compiz-fusion: Old, uses EOLed python27

So: 

* should we remove the entire section? 

Currently numbered 8. 

----

(1) <https://discord.com/channels/727023752348434432/760416197803245591/1022368731080433764>
